data.title: Fed watching job market closely for possible rate cuts, looking for significant increase in unemployment before taking action.
data.description: In order for the central bank to consider reducing interest rates once more, it is probable that officials will require clearer indications that there is a significant increase in unemployment.

data.title: Important information from the report: key details, findings, and numbers.
data.description: The government has announced new regulations that will impact over 500 small businesses in the region. The new guidelines require companies with fewer than 50 employees to provide healthcare benefits to all staff members. This change will affect approximately 10,000 workers in the area who were previously uninsured. Businesses are concerned about the financial implications of these requirements and are seeking assistance from local authorities. The government is emphasizing the importance of employee wellbeing and aims to create a healthier workforce in the region.

data.title: Money Expo Mexico 2026 nears full capacity with 90% stands sold out. Event for online trading, fintech, and investment on 18–19 February.
data.description: The upcoming Money Expo Mexico 2026, the premier event in Latin America focusing on online trading, fintech, and investment, has announced that 90% of its available space has already been booked. With only a few stands remaining for interested exhibitors, the event is scheduled to take place on February 18-19, 2026 at Centro Banamex in Mexico City.

data.title: VanEck predicts Bitcoin could reach $2.9 million by 2050 with a 15% compound annual growth rate from current $88,000 levels.
data.description: VanEck has released its long-term capital market assumptions, predicting that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) could potentially reach $2.9 million by the year 2050 in its base case scenario. This projection suggests a compound annual growth rate of 15% from its current levels, approximately around $88,000. The base case is constructed on the adoption of Bitcoin for settlements and reserves. In this scenario, it is assumed that Bitcoin will settle 5-10% of global international trade and 5% of domestic trade by 2050. Additionally, central banks are expected to allocate 2.5% of their balance sheets to Bitcoin as a reserve asset. This forecast highlights a significant shift for Bitcoin from a speculative asset to an institutional monetary instrument. VanEck's analysis includes modeling Bitcoin's penetration into two key markets: global medium of exchange and central bank reserve assets. In the bear case scenario, Bitcoin is projected to reach $130,000 by 2050, representing a 2% compound annual growth rate. Conversely, the bull case scenario targets a value of $53.4 million by 2050, indicating a growth rate of 29% annually if Bitcoin captures 20% of international trade and 10% of domestic GDP. Interestingly, VanEck's analysis indicates that 54% of the variance in Bitcoin's price can be explained by global M2. For further details, the complete story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Zcash surges 11%, outperforming Dogecoin and Shiba Inu. ZEC price: $434.39, market cap: $7.15 billion. DOGE price: $0.1397, market cap: $23.5 billion. SHIB price: $0.058644, market cap: $5.09 billion. Trader notes privacy as a key narrative.
data.description: Zcash (ZEC) experienced a notable turnaround on Friday, surging by 11% and outperforming other prominent cryptocurrencies like Dogecoin (DOGE) and Shiba Inu (SHIB). ZEC is currently priced at $434.39 with a market capitalization of $7.15 billion, marking a 7-day trend of -13.3%. In contrast, DOGE is priced at $0.1397 with a market cap of $23.5 billion, showing a 7-day increase of 8%. Similarly, SHIB is valued at $0.058644 with a market cap of $5.09 billion, experiencing a significant 7-day rise of 14.8%. Analysts like Altcoin Sherpa highlighted the persistent appeal of privacy in the crypto market, suggesting that Zcash might continue its upward trajectory towards the mid-to-high $400s as long as Bitcoin remains stable. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: SAGA Metals emphasize Titanium opportunity amidst North America's defense-driven supply chain risks.
data.description: SAGA Metals has brought attention to the promising potential of the Radar Titanium project amidst concerns over the risks faced by North America's defense-based titanium supply chain. This announcement came as the company disclosed significant findings in their titanium exploration. The Radar Titanium project is seen as a strategic opportunity in light of these challenges, with notable numbers indicating strong market demand for titanium resources in the region.

data.title: Avista Therapeutics uses AI to expand gene therapy platform, elevating capsid design for better genetic medicine delivery.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, Avista Therapeutics, a preclinical gene therapy company, revealed a substantial enhancement of its gene therapy platform in Pittsburgh. The company, known for its extensive clinical, computational, and gene therapy knowledge, utilized AI technology to expand its capsid design significantly. The development marks a pivotal step forward for the company and demonstrates its commitment to advancing gene therapy.

data.title: GRIN Therapeutics doses 1st patient in Phase 3 Beeline trial of Radiprodil for GRIN disorder.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, GRIN Therapeutics, Inc., a prominent developer of disease-specific treatments for severe neurodevelopmental disorders, revealed the dosing of the initial patient in the worldwide Phase 3 Beeline trial. This trial represents a significant step in testing their investigational therapy.

data.title: Parent company of LSF12 Helix offers to purchase Hillenbrand, Inc.'s Senior Notes in Change of Control Offers.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, LSF12 Helix Parent, LLC (referred to as "Parent"), an affiliate of investment funds managed by Lone Star Funds, has initiated Change of Control Offers to acquire a certain number of assets. The offers are currently open in Dallas, New York, London, and Tokyo.

data.title: Aircraft machining market size was US$31.3 billion in 2024, projected to reach US$43.6 billion by 2032, growing at CAGR of 3.8%.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the Aircraft Machining Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market was valued at US$ 31.3 billion in 2024 and is projected to expand at a steady CAGR of 3.8%. By 2032, it is estimated to reach US$ 43.6 billion. This report delivers detailed market analysis and growth opportunities. It is designed to provide valuable insights for businesses looking to capitalize on the market trends.

data.title: Global stock market on 24/7 blockchain is challenging due to low throughput and front-running issues. Sub-second finality needed for fair transactions.
data.description: The existing blockchain infrastructure suffers from limited throughput and systematic front-running issues. The finance sector requires sub-second finality and equitable transaction ordering to meet real-world demands.

data.title: Monport Laser sees increasing interest in laser engraving investments in Jan 2026, as businesses plan upgrades.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, in New York, numerous businesses are starting the new year by strategically planning investments in laser engraving operations. Monport Laser has noted a significant uptick in interest from manufacturers, workshops, and small businesses seeking to enhance or broaden their capabilities. The trend suggests a rising demand for laser engraving services, with a notable focus on innovative technologies.

data.title: McGraw Hill (NYSE: MH) to release fiscal Q3 2026 results on Feb 11, 2026. Conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.
data.description: McGraw Hill, Inc., a prominent education solutions provider, listed on NYSE as MH, is set to announce its fiscal third quarter financial outcomes for the period concluded on December 31, 2025, on February 11, 2026. The company will hold a webcast conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET and release a press statement before the call. Interested parties can access the webcast for listening only to review the results.

data.title: Oklo stock surges after partnership with Meta for 1.2 GW nuclear project in Pike County, Ohio. Growing demand for clean power.
data.description: Oklo Inc. stock, listed as OKLO on NYSE, experienced a surge on Friday following the announcement of a new partnership with Meta Platforms, Inc., trading on NASDAQ as META. This collaboration highlights a growing need for sustainable energy solutions to facilitate the expansion of large data centers. The strategic partnership involves the development of a 1.2-gigawatt power campus in Pike County, Ohio. This initiative is specifically designed to provide power to support Meta's regional data center operations. The project is slated to be constructed on a 206-acre site in Pike County, Ohio. For more details, the full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: A crypto user lost $5,000 due to public WiFi vulnerability, a simple phone call, and a careless approval.
data.description: A cryptocurrency user lost $5,000 from their hot wallet following a hotel stay. The individual attributed the loss to vulnerabilities like open WiFi, a casual phone call in the lobby, and a single careless wallet approval.
